nasb.text: I set My bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a sign of a covenant between Me and the earth.

esv.text: I have set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be a sign of the covenant between me and the earth.

cnv.text: 我把彩虹放在雲彩中，作我與大地立約的記號。

ccb.text: 我把彩虹放在云中，作为我跟大地立约的记号。

csbs.text: 我把我的彩虹放在云中，它就是我与大地立约的标记。
